title: French Duck Rillettes
description: A classic French dish made with tender duck meat, perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: 2. Season the duck breast with salt, pepper, and chopped thyme.
3. In a large Dutch oven, heat the duck fat over medium heat.
4. Sear the duck breast for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
5. Transfer the duck breast to the preheated oven and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. Remove the duck breast from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
7. Shred the duck breast with two forks and transfer it to a food processor.
8. Add the sliced onions, garlic, and white wine (if using) to the food processor.
9. Process the mixture until smooth, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Transfer the rillettes to an airtight container and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
